THIS REPORT DOES NOT CONSTITUTE AN ADMISSION OR A CONCLUSION BY FDA, MEDTRONIC, OR ITS EMPLOYEES THAT THE DEVICE, MEDTRONIC, OR ITS EMPLOYEE CAUSED OR CONTRIBUTED TO THE EVENT DESCRIBED IN THE REPORT. PRODUCT EVENT SUMMARY: THE DEVICE WAS RETURNED AND ANALYZED. THE RETURNED DEVICE INDICATED A DAMAGED INTEGRATED CIRCUIT. HYBRID ANALYSIS FOUND THE NO-TELEMETRY CONDITION WAS CAUSED BY A DEPLETED BATTERY DUE TO EXTREME HIGH CURRENT ON THE HYBRID. THE HIGH CURRENT WAS CAUSED BY ELECTRICAL OVER STRESS DAMAGE ON THE L466 INTEGRATED CIRCUIT. IF INFORMATION IS PROVIDED IN THE FUTURE, A SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT WILL BE ISSUED.

recalls.reason: Reveal LINQ with TruRhythm ICMs, that undergo a partial electrical reset appear to be programmed "ON", but are no longer able to detect and report Brady and Pause events to clinicians.
